# build app.toml from components

```
- app.toml (generated from components)
- components/
  - dependencies/
    - service-x.toml (all related to the service x)
    - service-y.toml
  - prod/
    - prod-specific.toml
  - perf/
    - perf-specific.toml
  - service.toml (basic configuration)
```
